title: Apathy for psychiatrists - In a Nutshell!
author_string: Naguy, Ahmed, Malek, Bodour Sulaiman, Safar, Fatema Mohammad, Alsalem, Noor Jassim
abstract: In this paper, authors try to briefly bring together current knowledge regarding apathy as a transdiagnostic construct, from conceptual insights to measurement, neurobiology, and treatment.
